original: You are staggered by the hail of fire!
"+k.m.capitalize(e.getCombatName(),!1)+" "+(e.isPlural?"are":"is")+" staggered by the hail of fire!

"+k.m.capitalize(this.getCombatName())+" groans, a noise like a ghost suffering clogged sinuses. Further utterances hiss through her oily lips, each one an increasingly aroused response to irresistible erotic stimulation. So used to her lightning reflexes, you’re almost caught off guard by an unusual sequence of heavy-handed strikes.

She bumbles through the air like a drunken bee; the wash from her jet boosters sheds light on a massive tenting obstruction boiling inexorably through the upper reaches of her suit. She releases her weapons and fidgets fretfully, dragged down by the thickening weight of her throbbing distress. Just before touching ground, her suit’s middle tears open, snapping her combination shield & jet belt and bringing her to heel with a resounding thud.

The laquine herm focuses inward to battle a massive erection that lengthens inexorably into the upper half of her suit. A pole of thick, irrepressible maleness unbalances her top-heavy profile as it bulges against its skin-tight confines. Snap! Off her combo shield & jet belt comes, broken by the solid shaft’s expanding presence. Guttural sounds rumble up from her heaving belly as she punches a dent in the nearest surface and fidgets fitfully, tearing at a mechanism around her chin guard.

"+textify(G||(G=(0,a.Z)(["A fat, glistening horse-cock springs out from her armor’s splitting seam like a gavel on a sound block; the taut, pulsing organ, like a pillar of granite, bobbles up and down with her racing heartbeat, oozing viscous purple lubricants. Runnels of grime and sweat trickle down an ocean of wet black fur, catching the light through writhing veils of overcooked semiochemicals. There your opponent stands, shamed, horny, and irate, fingers quivering with the acute desire to curl around the source of her distraction. “Hhhhff... hhh... hhhhffh!!!” It’s crazy, but she intends to fight you like this. “Ggggrrhh!” Even with her lust-sloppy cock bouncing around she’ll put up a fight. No more shields, no more jumping.
